caption: The video features a man performing on stage, likely at a concert or event. He is wearing a white shirt with a black vest adorned with intricate blue and red embroidery. The man has long hair tied back and is wearing glasses. He is singing into a microphone while playing an acoustic guitar, which is partially visible. The background consists of wooden blinds, suggesting an indoor venue. The audience, seen from behind, appears to be attentively watching and listening to his performance. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, possibly indicating the name of the event or organization. The atmosphere seems calm and focused, with the performer deeply engaged in his music.
